treatment_information.treatment_response: Tolerated well; left arm started to improve

treatment_information.specific_treatment: outpatient occupational therapy evaluation and treatment
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: including adaptive equipment and compensatory strategy training
50 mg-325 mg-40 mg, take by mouth every eight hours as needed for headache

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted with left hand and arm weakness
Tests performed including bloodwork, MRI of the brain and spine, and lumbar puncture
Started on high dose IV steroids
Discharged with instructions for occupational therapy and follow-up

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Continue treatment with a Multiple Sclerosis specialist
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expected continued improvement in arm strength
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: May continue to experience headaches and back pain
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient's left arm improvement expected post-steroid therapy
